channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Amarnath and Vaishno Devi Yatras Suspended Due to Weather Concerns
item.description: The Amarnath and Mata Vaishno Devi yatras in Jammu and Kashmir have been temporarily suspended from July 19, 2026, due to inclement weather forecasts issued by the India Meteorological Department (IMD...

item.title: Blue Jays defeat White Sox 1-0; World Series statue unveiled at Rogers Centre
item.description: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a 1-0 victory over the Chicago White Sox on Saturday, snapping Chicago's four-game winning streak. Shane Bieber, making his fifth start of the season, pitched a four-hitt...

item.title: Amazon's satellite broadband enters South Africa through Herotel partnership
item.description: The article discusses Amazon's Leo satellite service entering the South African market via a distribution agreement with Herotel, a fibre and wireless operator. This partnership, dubbed 'Evry', will p...

item.title: AI Chatbots and Mental Health: The Role of Priests in the Philippines
item.description: The article explores the growing reliance of Filipinos on AI chatbots, or 'Godbots,' for spiritual guidance and mental health support, highlighting the contrast with traditional religious leadership. ...

item.title: Youth group plans peaceful protest against political intolerance in Enugu ahead of 2027 elections
item.description: Youths Off The Street Initiative (YOTSI), a youth-led civil society group, has planned a peaceful protest in Abuja to address growing political intolerance and undemocratic practices in Enugu State. T...

item.title: England Clinch Third Place with 6-4 Win Over France at 2026 World Cup
item.description: England secured the 2026 FIFA World Cup bronze medal with a thrilling 6-4 victory over France in the third-place playoff. The match, held in Miami, saw England storm into a four-goal first-half lead, ...

item.title: US launches airstrikes against Iran following attack on troops
item.description: The United States has conducted airstrikes against Iran in response to the deaths of two military personnel and the disappearance of a third following an Iranian attack in Jordan. Central Command conf...

item.title: Severe Thunderstorm and Air Quality Warnings in Effect for Ottawa
item.description: The article reports that a severe thunderstorm watch and air quality warning are currently in effect for Ottawa. Published on July 18, 2026, the alert highlights the potential for dangerous weather co...

item.title: Kolette's Support for Long in Kapamilya Deal Or No Deal
item.description: The article discusses the ongoing Kapamilya Deal Or No Deal segment featuring Long Mejia and Kolette Madelo. Long expressed his desire to assist Kolette if he were to win a prize of one million pesos....

item.title: 4-Magnitude Earthquake Shakes Quetta and Surrounding Areas, No Casualties Reported
item.description: A 4-magnitude earthquake struck Quetta, Ziarat, and surrounding regions of Balochistan on Saturday, according to the National Seismic Monitoring Centre (NSMC). The earthquake's epicenter was located 3...

item.title: Florida woman receives controversial license plate with suggestive message
item.description: A 76-year-old Florida resident, Nancy Dello Stritto, received a new license plate with the alphanumeric combination 'SQZ A55', which quickly went viral on social media due to its suggestive nature. In...

item.title: WNBA Suspends Coach for Inappropriate Comment About Star Player
item.description: The WNBA has suspended Toronto Raptors (Tempo) head coach Sandy Brondello without pay for one game after she used the term 'protected species' to describe Atlanta Dream star Angel Reese during a heate...

item.title: England and France in Thrilling World Cup Bronze Match with 10 Goals
item.description: In a stunningly high-scoring World Cup third-place playoff, England defeated France 6-4 in Miami on July 18, 2026. The match, marked by relentless action and dramatic twists, saw England's young stars...

item.title: England and France battle to thrilling FIFA World Cup bronze medal showdown
item.description: In a highly anticipated third-place playoff at the Miami Stadium, England secured a narrow 6-4 victory over France in a chaotic FIFA World Cup encounter. The match, which followed painful semi-final e...

item.title: Influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate Arrested in Miami on Sex Trafficking Charges
item.description: Andrew and Tristan Tate, dual U.S. and British citizens known for their hypermasculine social media personas, were arrested in Miami by federal authorities on Saturday. The U.S. Marshals Service confi...

item.title: Calls for Leadership Changes and Institutional Reform at IDAC Amid Allegations Against Head Andrea Johnson
item.description: The controversy surrounding Andrea Johnson, head of the Independent Development Agency (IDAC), has intensified calls for leadership changes and institutional reforms. Allegations of misconduct and eth...

item.title: US-Iran military clashes escalate with strikes and retaliatory attacks in Gulf region
item.description: The Gulf region has witnessed a significant escalation in military tensions between the United States and Iran, with both sides engaging in a series of strikes and retaliatory attacks. According to Ir...

item.title: Yobe State Police Arrest Drug Trafficker and Kidnapping Kingpin
item.description: Yobe State Police Command has arrested a suspected drug baron and kidnapping kingpin as part of their crackdown on drug trafficking and violent crimes. In a raid on 17 July 2026, officers from Yindisk...

item.title: New York City Mayor Considers Arresting Israeli Prime Minister Over ICC Warrant
item.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani has sparked controversy by considering the arrest of Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, a key ally of former President Donald Trump, amid allegations of war ...

item.title: Argentina's Logistical Complaints Ahead of World Cup 2026 Final Against Spain
item.description: Argentina coach Lionel Scaloni has raised concerns with FIFA regarding the logistical arrangements for the 2026 World Cup final against Spain, claiming his team faced an unfair advantage. The match, s...
